name: Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches soft ball stage (234°F on an instant-read thermometer).
3. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients.
4. Beat with an electric mixer until the mixture begins to thicken.
5. Pour into a greased 9x11-inch pan.
6. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
